Class AfterConvertEvent<E>

java.lang.Object
java.util.EventObject
org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event.CassandraMappingEvent<E>
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.event.AfterConvertEvent<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AfterConvertEvent<E> extends CassandraMappingEvent<E>
Event to be triggered after converting a Row into an entity.
Since:
2.1
Author:
Mark Paluch
